body: import org.evosuite.runtime.EvoRunnerParameters;
import org.junit.runner.RunWith;

import me.lemire.integercompression.IntWrapper;
import me.lemire.integercompression.Simple9;
import static org.evosuite.runtime.EvoAssertions.*;

translation: # Index 14 out of bounds for length 14
assert str(e) == "object of type 'NoneType' has no len()"
assert str(e) == "uncompress0() missing 4 required positional arguments: 'in_', 'inpos', 'inlength', and 'out'"
